name: EternalBlue SMBv1 RCE (MS17-010)
description: Buffer overflow in SMBv1 allows remote code execution. Exploited by WannaCry ransomware.

name: BlueKeep RDP RCE
description: Use-after-free in RDP allows pre-auth remote code execution.

name: Zerologon — Netlogon Privilege Escalation
description: Cryptographic flaw in Netlogon allows domain controller takeover.

name: PrintNightmare — Print Spooler RCE
description: Print Spooler allows remote code execution with SYSTEM privileges.
recommendation: Disable Print Spooler or install KB5004945.

name: PrintNightmare Variant — Print Spooler RCE
recommendation: Disable Print Spooler and install all July 2021 patches.

name: HiveNightmare / SeriousSAM
description: Non-admin users can read SAM/SYSTEM/SECURITY hive files.
recommendation: Restrict ACLs on SAM database files and install patches.

name: Follina — MSDT RCE via Office
description: Microsoft Support Diagnostic Tool RCE via ms-msdt protocol handler.

name: Outlook NTLM Relay — Zero-Click
description: Outlook calendar reminder triggers NTLM hash leak without user interaction.

name: TCP/IP IPv6 Remote Code Execution
description: Integer underflow in Windows TCP/IP allows RCE via crafted IPv6 packets.
